```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Gaussian distribution.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(x = c(-10, 10)), aes(x)) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = 0, sd = 1),
    aes(color = "µ=0, σ=1"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = 0, sd = 2),
    aes(color = "µ=0, σ=2"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = 0, sd = 3),
    aes(color = "µ=0, σ=3"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(color = "Parameters") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Density") +
  ggplot2::xlab("x") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
